item.title: 17th Sunday of Pentecost, The Canaanite Woman, Lessons in how to pray., 2008-10-12
item.description: :17th Sunday of Pentecost. The Canaanite Woman, Lessons in how to pray., 2008-10-12
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :17th Sunday of Pentecost. The Canaanite Woman, Lessons in how to pray., 2008-10-12

item.title: 17th Sunday of Pentecost, 2010-09-19
item.description: :17th Sunday of Pentecost. The Caananite woman teaches us *exactly* how we should pray: with knowledge, simplicity, persistence and humility. A close examination of her encounter with Christ shows these virtues plainly, and should also show us which ones we are lacking in (definitely at least 3 of the 4!).
item.itunes:author: Priest Seraphim Holland
item.itunes:summary: :17th Sunday of Pentecost. The Caananite woman teaches us *exactly* how we should pray: with knowledge, simplicity, persistence and humility. A close examination of her encounter with Christ shows these virtues plainly, and should also show us which ones we are lacking in (definitely at least 3 of the 4!).
